message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
class Game {
}

class EnemyFactory {
  +create(): AbstractAircraft
}

class AbstractAircraft {
  <<abstract>>
  +maxHp: int
  +hp: int
  +kind: int
  +AbstractAircraft(int locationX, int locationY, int speedX, int speedY, int hp): void
  +decreaseHp(int decrease): void
  +getHp(): int
  +shoot(): List<BaseBullet>
}

class EliteEnemy {
  -shootNum: int
  -power: int
  -direction: int
  -kind: int
  +EliteEnemy(int locationX, int locationY, int speedX, int speedY, int hp): void
  +forward(): void
  +shoot(): List<BaseBullet>
  +addProp(): List<AbstractProp>
}

class BossEnemy {
  -shootNum: int
  -power: int
  -direction: int
  -kind: int
  +BossEnemy(int locationX, int locationY, int speedX, int speedY, int hp): void
  +forward(): void
  +enemyKind(): int
  +shoot(): List<Bullet>
}

class MobEnemy {
  +MobEnemy(int locationX, int locationY, int speedX, int speedY, int hp): void
  +forward(): void
  +kind(): int
  +shoot(): List<BaseBullet>
}

class EliteFactory {
  +create(): EliteEnemy
}

class BossFactory {
  +create(): BossEnemy
}

class MobFactory {
  +create(): MobEnemy
}

Game --|> EnemyFactory
Game --|> AbstractAircraft

EnemyFactory <|-- EliteFactory
EnemyFactory <|-- BossFactory
EnemyFactory <|-- MobFactory

EliteFactory --|> EliteEnemy
BossFactory --|> BossEnemy
MobFactory --|> MobEnemy

EliteEnemy <|-- AbstractAircraft
BossEnemy <|-- AbstractAircraft
MobEnemy <|-- AbstractAircraft

note right of EliteFactory: create
note right of BossFactory: create
note right of MobFactory: create
@enduml
